word: H2051 - וְדָן - Vᵉdân - ved-awn' - Dan also

sections.paragraph:
Original: ודן

Transliteration: vedân

Phonetic: ved-awn'

BDB Definition:

Vedan = "and Dan"
  1. a place, site uncertain, perhaps near Medina in Arabia
  2. may simply be read 'even Dan'

Origin: perhaps for H5730

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
